prompt: Fix only the neckline of the dress in image 1. There is a small triangular keyhole gap/opening at the centre front neckline just below the bow tie. This gap should not be there. Close it completely — fill it with the same red and white pinstripe fabric. The result should show gathered pinstripe fabric meeting at the centre with a small flat bow, no gap, no skin visible at the chest between the bow and the bodice. Look at images 2 and 3 to see exactly how the closed neckline should look. Change nothing else — not the fabric, the skirt, the model, the background, or any other part of the image.
